nasb.text: The tongue of the infant cleaves To the roof of its mouth because of thirst; The little ones ask for bread, But no one breaks it for them.

esv.text: The tongue of the nursing infant sticks to the roof of its mouth for thirst; the children beg for food, but no one gives to them.

cnv.text: 嬰兒的舌頭因乾渴而緊貼上膛； 孩童求餅，卻沒有人分給他們。

ccb.text: 婴儿干渴难忍，舌头紧贴上膛； 孩童乞求食物，却无人给予。
